message:
feat: add build SHA to feedback-created GitHub issues (#11049)

The feedback modal now automatically includes the console build SHA
as a linked commit reference in the issue description. This helps
the hive enumerator agent identify which build introduced a bug
without requiring the user to add it manually.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
